ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip this prompt for the same target until the plugin reloads.
ast.target: 跳过此提示，直到插件重新加载，针对相同目标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opens a GitHub issue draft with diagnostic context prefilled.
ast.target: 打开一个预填了诊断上下文的 GitHub 问题草案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opens a draft email to contact@polleo.ai.
ast.target: 打开一封发送至 contact@polleo.ai 的电子邮件草案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opens the public issue tracker without prefilling anything.
ast.target: 打开公共问题跟踪器，不预填任何内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which backend Gryphon uses to reach the model. "Auto" prefers Claude Code if installed, else the first available API key (Anthropic → OpenAI → Google).
ast.target: Gryphon 用于连接模型的后端。\"自动\" 优先使用 Claude Code（如果已安装），否则使用第一个可用的 API 密钥（Anthropic → OpenAI → Google）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also changeable from the chat toolbar.
ast.target: 也可从聊天工具栏更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also changeable from the chat toolbar. Gryphon resolves these tiers to the latest concrete versions at chat time.
ast.target: 也可从聊天工具栏更改。Gryphon 会在聊天时将这些层级解析为最新的具体版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Safe = auto-accept edits. YOLO = skip all checks. Plan = propose only.
ast.target: 安全 = 自动接受编辑。YOLO = 跳过所有检查。计划 = 仅提议。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait for the model's first token before treating the request as stuck. Leave empty for the model-adaptive default (Haiku 30s, Sonnet 60s, Opus 120s, Opus 1M 180s; non-Anthropic providers 60s). Set 5–600 to override for slow networks or unusually large prompts.
ast.target: 等待模型第一个 token 的时间，超过则视为请求卡住。留空使用模型自适应默认值（Haiku 30 秒，Sonnet 60 秒，Opus 120 秒，Opus 1M 180 秒；非 Anthropic 提供商 60 秒）。设置 5-600 可为慢速网络或异常大的提示词覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open chat in a main tab instead of the right sidebar.
ast.target: 在主标签页而非右侧边栏中打开聊天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders (relative to vault root) Athena watches for new Web Clipper files. Defaults cover the Obsidian Web Clipper extension's factory default (clippings/) and the legacy path (inbox/Clippings). Change takes effect after restarting Obsidian.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的文件夹列表（相对于保险库根目录），Athena 监视这些文件夹以获取新的 Web Clipper 文件。默认值覆盖 Obsidian Web Clipper 扩展的出厂默认设置（clippings/）和旧路径（inbox/Clippings）。更改在重启 Obsidian 后生效。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Gryphon never auto-sends — every option opens a draft you review first. Conversation content is NOT included unless you paste it yourself. Diagnostic context (plugin version, provider, model, OS) IS included so we can reproduce.
ast.target: Gryphon 从不自动发送 — 每个选项都会打开一个您先审阅的草案。对话内容不会包含在内，除非您自己粘贴。诊断上下文（插件版本、提供商、模型、操作系统）会包含在内，以便我们重现。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Welcome to Athena — your Second Brain
ast.target: 欢迎使用 Athena — 您的第二大脑

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Athena is your Second Brain in Obsidian — ingest URLs, papers, repos, and videos into a structured knowledge base, then chat with what you've read. Pick a provider to begin.
ast.target: Athena 是您在 Obsidian 中的第二大脑 — 将 URL、论文、仓库和视频摄入结构化的知识库，然后与您阅读过的内容聊天。选择一个提供商以开始。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `parsed` property on `text` blocks is deprecated, please use `parsed_output` instead.
ast.target: `text` 块上的 `parsed` 属性已弃用，请改用 `parsed_output`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Anthropic: The `compactionControl` parameter is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Use server-side compaction instead by passing `edits: [{ type: "compact_20260112" }]` in the params passed to `toolRunner()`. See https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/compaction
ast.target: Anthropic：`compactionControl` 参数已弃用，将在未来版本中移除。请通过在传递给 `toolRunner()` 的参数中传递 `edits: [{ type: \"compact_20260112\" }]` 来使用服务器端压缩。参见 https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/compaction

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [gryphon/sdk] stop_reason=tool_use 但没有 tool_use 块

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [gryphon/openai] finish_reason=tool_calls 但没有 tool_calls 存在

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning text from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的文本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning data from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning function calls from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的函数调用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning executable code from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的可执行代码。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning code execution result from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的代码执行结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: batches.createEmbeddings() is experimental and may change without notice.
ast.target: batches.createEmbeddings() 是实验性功能，未来可能会有变动。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: API key should be set when using the Gemini API.
ast.target: 使用 Gemini API 时应设置 API 密钥。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: extraBody provided but current request body is a Blob. extraBody will be ignored as merging is not supported for Blob bodies.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 提供了 extraBody，但当前请求体是 Blob。由于不支持 Blob 体的合并，extraBody 将被忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is valid JSON but not a non-array object. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体是有效的 JSON，但不是非数组对象。跳过将 extraBody 应用于请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is not valid JSON. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体不是有效的 JSON。跳过将 extraBody 应用于请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Live music generation is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 实时音乐生成功能是实验性的，未来版本可能会有变化。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: Ephemeral token support is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 警告：临时令牌支持是实验性的，未来版本可能会有变化。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: The SDK's ephemeral token support is in v1alpha only. Please use const ai = new GoogleGenAI({apiKey: token.name, httpOptions: { apiVersion: 'v1alpha' }}); before session connection.
ast.target: 警告：SDK 的临时令牌支持目前仅处于 v1alpha 阶段。请在会话连接前使用 const ai = new GoogleGenAI({apiKey: token.name, httpOptions: { apiVersion: 'v1alpha' }});。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` is deprecated, please set the fields on `LiveConnectConfig` directly. This will become an error in a future version (not before Q3 2025).
ast.target: 设置 `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` 已弃用，请直接在 `LiveConnectConfig` 上设置字段。这将在未来版本（不早于 2025 年第三季度）成为错误。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid maximumRemoteCalls value provided for automatic function calling. Disabled automatic function calling. Please provide a valid integer value greater than 0. maximumRemoteCalls provided:
ast.target: 为自动函数调用提供的 maximumRemoteCalls 值无效。已禁用自动函数调用。请提供一个大于 0 的有效整数值。提供的 maximumRemoteCalls 值为：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: Both GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_ENTERPRISE and GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI are set with conflicting values. The value of GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_ENTERPRISE will be used.
ast.target: 警告：GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_ENTERPRISE 和 GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI 均已设置且值冲突。将使用 GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_ENTERPRISE 的值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Client level httpOptions.extraBody is not supported by the interactions client and will be ignored.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 客户端级别的 httpOptions.extraBody 不受交互客户端支持，将被忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Interactions usage is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 交互功能的使用是实验性的，未来版本可能会有变化。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Both GOOGLE_API_KEY and GEMINI_API_KEY are set. Using GOOGLE_API_KEY.
ast.target: GOOGLE_API_KEY 和 GEMINI_API_KEY 均已设置。使用 GOOGLE_API_KEY。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [gryphon] chat-history.json migrated: stripped [gryphon-context] from existing user messages (issue #35)
ast.target: [gryphon] chat-history.json 已迁移：从现有用户消息中剥离了 [gryphon-context]（问题 #35）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [athena] disable returned but Gryphon is still in enabledPlugins
ast.target: [athena] disable 已返回，但 Gryphon 仍在 enabledPlugins 中

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [athena] 无法禁用 gryphon 插件：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [athena] canonical slug derivation failed, falling back:
ast.target: [athena] 规范 slug 推导失败，回退：

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ask before every edit and command
ast.target: 每次编辑和命令前询问

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Auto-accept edits, still prompt on bash
ast.target: 自动接受编辑，仍在 bash 命令时提示

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a side note — model logs it without expanding (costs ~30 tokens)
ast.target: 添加侧注 — 模型会记录但不展开（约消耗 30 个令牌）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Clear seed context for next message — visible bubbles stay
ast.target: 清除下一条消息的种子上下文 — 可见的气泡保留

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Summarize the conversation and start fresh with the summary as context
ast.target: 总结对话并以摘要作为上下文重新开始

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 显示上下文窗口使用情况

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Run diagnostics — versions, providers, hooks, network reachability
ast.target: 运行诊断 — 版本、提供商、钩子、网络可达性

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 切换努力级别（打开选择器）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Save conversation as a note in Gryphon/Exports/
ast.target: 将对话保存为 Gryphon/Exports/ 中的笔记

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Send feedback or report a bug (opens browser / Mail)
ast.target: 发送反馈或报告错误（打开浏览器/邮件）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show all commands and keyboard shortcuts
ast.target: 显示所有命令和键盘快捷键

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Scaffold Gryphon/MANUAL.md template in the vault if missing
ast.target: 如果缺失，在保险库中搭建 Gryphon/MANUAL.md 模板

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 切换权限模式（打开选择器）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Switch permission mode (opens picker — alias of /perm)
ast.target: 切换权限模式（打开选择器 — /perm 的别名）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Insert highlighted editor text as a quoted reference in your prompt
ast.target: 将编辑器中高亮的文本作为带引号的引用插入到提示中

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Summarize the conversation as an inline note without resetting
ast.target: 将对话总结为内联笔记而不重置

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show session status — model, provider, perm, tokens, cost, messages
ast.target: 显示会话状态 — 模型、提供商、权限、令牌、成本、消息

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show session usage (cost, tokens, messages, duration)
ast.target: 显示会话使用情况（成本、令牌、消息、持续时间）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show plugin version, provider, model, OS, Obsidian version
ast.target: 显示插件版本、提供商、模型、操作系统、Obsidian 版本

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Uses your Anthropic API key — the unambiguously terms-safe route
ast.target: 使用您的 Anthropic API 密钥 — 条款明确无误的安全途径

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spawns a local `claude` subprocess — confirm your usage complies with that product's terms
ast.target: 生成一个本地 `claude` 子进程 — 请确认您的使用符合该产品的条款

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 使用您的 OpenAI API 密钥

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Uses your Google AI Studio key
ast.target: 使用您的 Google AI Studio 密钥

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spawns the OpenAI Codex CLI — uses its own auth (run `codex login` once); subject to that product's terms
ast.target: 生成 OpenAI Codex CLI — 使用其自身的认证（运行一次 `codex login`）；受该产品条款约束

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spawns the Google Gemini CLI — auth via your Google API key
ast.target: 生成 Google Gemini CLI — 通过您的 Google API 密钥进行认证

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Prefer Claude Code if installed, else first available API key (Anthropic → OpenAI → Google)
ast.target: 如果已安装则优先使用 Claude Code，否则使用第一个可用的 API 密钥（Anthropic → OpenAI → Google）

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 处理所有待处理项（收件箱 + 剪藏）

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 健康检查 + 自动修复

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All tracked URLs and their status
ast.target: 所有已跟踪的 URL 及其状态

ast.name: desc
ast.target: AI 从日志中提出洞察

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Regenerate the wiki digest for a page
ast.target: 为页面重新生成维基摘要

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 重命名页面并更新链接

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 软删除页面并移至回收站

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 将多个页面合并为一个

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 永久删除旧回收站内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reads a file from the local filesystem. Returns content with line numbers in the format '<line_no>\t<line_text>'. Use the offset and limit parameters to read large files in chunks.
ast.target: 从本地文件系统读取文件。返回内容，格式为 '<行号>\\t<行文本>'。使用 offset 和 limit 参数可分块读取大文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Absolute path to the file, or path relative to the vault root.
ast.target: 文件的绝对路径，或相对于保险库根目录的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line number to start reading from (1-based). Optional.
ast.target: 开始读取的行号（从1开始）。可选。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of lines to read. Defaults to 2000.
ast.target: 要读取的最大行数。默认为2000。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fast file pattern matching that works with any codebase size. Supports glob patterns like '**/*.js' or 'src/**/*.ts'. Returns matching file paths sorted by modification time (newest first).
ast.target: 适用于任何代码库规模的快速文件模式匹配。支持 glob 模式，如 '**/*.js' 或 'src/**/*.ts'。返回按修改时间排序（最新优先）的匹配文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glob pattern to match files against (e.g. '**/*.md').
ast.target: 用于匹配文件的 glob 模式（例如 '**/*.md'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The directory to search in. Defaults to the vault root.
ast.target: 要搜索的目录。默认为保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search file contents using a regex pattern. Returns matching lines, file paths, or match counts depending on output_mode. Filter the file set with the path or glob parameters.
ast.target: 使用正则表达式模式搜索文件内容。根据 output_mode 返回匹配的行、文件路径或匹配计数。使用 path 或 glob 参数过滤文件集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The regular expression pattern to search for.
ast.target: 要搜索的正则表达式模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: File or directory to search in. Defaults to vault root.
ast.target: 要搜索的文件或目录。默认为保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 按 glob 模式过滤文件（例如 '*.md'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit output to first N entries. Defaults to 250.
ast.target: 将输出限制为前 N 个条目。默认为250。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Writes a file to the local filesystem. Overwrites existing files. Creates parent directories as needed. Use Edit instead for targeted changes to existing files.
ast.target: 将文件写入本地文件系统。覆盖现有文件。根据需要创建父目录。对于现有文件的定向更改，请使用 Edit。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Absolute path or path relative to the vault root.
ast.target: 绝对路径或相对于保险库根目录的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full content to write to the file.
ast.target: 要写入文件的完整内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performs exact string replacement in an existing file. The old_string must match exactly (including whitespace) and must be unique unless replace_all is true. Use Read first to see the current content.
ast.target: 在现有文件中执行精确字符串替换。old_string 必须完全匹配（包括空白），并且必须是唯一的，除非 replace_all 为 true。请先使用 Read 查看当前内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exact string to find. Must match including whitespace.
ast.target: 要查找的精确字符串。必须完全匹配，包括空白。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replacement string. Must differ from old_string.
ast.target: 替换字符串。必须与 old_string 不同。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 替换所有出现项（默认为 false）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to fetch. Must be http(s).
ast.target: 要获取的 URL。必须是 http(s)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional. What you want to extract from the page. Currently returned as-is in the response so you can apply it yourself.
ast.target: 可选。您希望从页面中提取的内容。目前按原样返回在响应中，以便您可以自行应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Searches the web and returns ranked results with title, URL, and snippet for each. Use this to find current information that isn't in your training data, or to discover URLs you can then WebFetch.
ast.target: 搜索网络并返回排名结果，每个结果包含标题、URL 和摘要。用于查找不在您训练数据中的当前信息，或发现您可以随后使用 WebFetch 的 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query. Be specific — search engines don't read minds.
ast.target: 搜索查询。请具体——搜索引擎不会读心术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of results to return (1-20). Default 10.
ast.target: 要返回的结果数量（1-20）。默认为10。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Executes a shell command in the vault directory. Use for any task outside the dedicated tools (Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep/WebFetch). Prefer the dedicated tools when they fit — they're faster and safer. Always quote paths with spaces.
ast.target: 在保险库目录中执行 shell 命令。用于任何专用工具（Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep/WebFetch）之外的任务。当专用工具适用时，请优先使用它们——它们更快更安全。始终用引号括起包含空格的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要执行的 shell 命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short description of what the command does (5-10 words). Helps the user decide whether to allow it.
ast.target: 命令功能的简短描述（5-10个词）。帮助用户决定是否允许执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Timeout in milliseconds (max 600000 = 10 min). Default 120000 (2 min).

ast.name: description
ast.source: A simple common HTTP client specifically for Google APIs and services.
ast.target: 一个专门用于 Google API 和服务的简单通用 HTTP 客户端。

ast.name: error
ast.source: wiki page has no raw_path field
ast.target: wiki 页面没有 raw_path 字段

ast.name: error
ast.source: wiki_page.py returned no result (check dev console for stderr)
ast.target: wiki_page.py 未返回结果（请检查开发控制台的 stderr）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Rate limited (key may be valid; try again later)
ast.target: 速率受限（密钥可能有效；请稍后重试）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Trash is empty — nothing to restore.
ast.target: 回收站为空——没有可恢复的内容。

ast.name: message
ast.source: **Rename failed**: new name cannot contain "/" or "\" — those are path separators.
ast.target: **重命名失败**：新名称不能包含 \"/\" 或 \"\\\" ——这些是路径分隔符。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将高亮文本引用到聊天中

ast.name: name
ast.target: 设置向导 (Web Clipper 配置)

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
ast.target: 按 Enter 发送，Shift+Enter 换行

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Image URL — use `kb add` with the page URL instead.
ast.target: 图片 URL — 请改用 `kb add` 命令并附上页面 URL。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Could not capture full content (requires authentication).
ast.target: 无法捕获完整内容 (需要身份验证)。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Browser capture failed (this can happen on Linux with sandbox restrictions, or with pages that block automation like Cloudflare-protected sites). Try the Obsidian Web Clipper extension instead.
ast.target: 浏览器捕获失败 (这可能发生在 Linux 系统上，由于沙箱限制，或者页面阻止了自动化操作，例如 Cloudflare 保护的站点)。请尝试使用 Obsidian Web Clipper 扩展。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This deletes the entire chat history for this session and starts fresh. The current conversation can't be recovered.
ast.target: 这将删除此会话的整个聊天记录并重新开始。当前对话无法恢复。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Type /<skill-name> to invoke a custom skill. Skills are .md files in your vault's Gryphon/Skills/ folder — see the README there for the file format. Five examples ship pre-populated.
ast.target: 输入 /<技能名称> 以调用自定义技能。技能是您保险库 Gryphon/Skills/ 文件夹中的 .md 文件 — 请参阅那里的 README 了解文件格式。预置了五个示例。

ast.name: text
ast.source: For permission modes, settings reference, troubleshooting, and where to ask for help, see
ast.target: 有关权限模式、设置参考、故障排除以及寻求帮助的地方，请参阅您保险库中的

ast.name: text
ast.source: ── Context cleared — prior conversation stays visible above ──
ast.target: ── 上下文已清除 — 之前的对话仍可在上方查看 ──

ast.name: text
ast.source: Gryphon connects Obsidian to Claude — read and edit your vault, run tools, and chat with your knowledge base. Pick a provider to begin.
ast.target: Gryphon 将 Obsidian 连接到 Claude — 读取和编辑您的保险库、运行工具，并与您的知识库聊天。选择一个提供商开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Built-in security: dangerous file paths and shell commands (rm -rf, writes into .obsidian/, curl | bash, etc.) always prompt before running — even in YOLO mode.
ast.target: 内置安全：危险的文件路径和 shell 命令 (rm -rf、写入 .obsidian/、curl | bash 等) 在运行前始终会提示 — 即使在 YOLO 模式下也是如此。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tune the rules in Settings → Gryphon → Security.
ast.target: 在设置 → Gryphon → 安全中调整规则。

ast.name: text
ast.source: New here? See the user manual at
ast.target: 初次使用？请参阅您保险库中的用户手册

ast.name: text
ast.source: in your vault for slash commands, permission modes, skills, and troubleshooting.
ast.target: ，了解斜杠命令、权限模式、技能和故障排除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No local `claude` binary detected. Claude Code is an advanced option for users who already have that product installed and have confirmed their usage complies with its vendor's terms. Most users should use the Anthropic API card instead.
ast.target: 未检测到本地 `claude` 二进制文件。Claude Code 是一个高级选项，适用于已安装该产品并已确认其使用符合其供应商条款的用户。大多数用户应改用 Anthropic API 卡。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Paste an Anthropic API key in settings. Adds credit-based usage independent of any subscription. Free tier: $5 of credits at signup.
ast.target: 在设置中粘贴 Anthropic API 密钥。添加基于信用的使用方式，独立于任何订阅。免费套餐：注册时赠送 $5 信用额度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Built-in security: dangerous file paths and shell commands (rm -rf, writes into .obsidian/, curl | bash, etc.) always prompt before running — even in YOLO mode.
ast.target: 内置安全：危险的文件路径和 shell 命令 (rm -rf、写入 .obsidian/、curl | bash 等) 在运行前始终会提示 — 即使在 YOLO 模式下也是如此。

ast.name: text
ast.source: in your vault for ingest commands, search, and synthesis.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your Second Brain is ready. Let's set up web clipping so you can capture pages from your browser.
ast.target: 您的第二大脑已准备就绪。让我们设置网页剪藏，以便您从浏览器捕获页面。

ast.name: text
ast.source: (not the Notion one) for your browser:

ast.name: text
ast.source: After installing, open the Web Clipper settings in your browser.
ast.target: 安装后，在浏览器中打开 Web Clipper 设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In the Web Clipper General settings, find the Vaults section. Add this vault name:
ast.target: 在 Web Clipper 常规设置中，找到保险库部分。添加此保险库名称：

ast.name: text
ast.source: In the Web Clipper template settings, set the folder to:
ast.target: 在 Web Clipper 模板设置中，将文件夹设置为：

ast.name: text
ast.source: In the Behavior section, look for these settings and set them as shown. If an option listed here doesn't match what you see, just skip it — defaults are fine.
ast.target: 在行为部分，查找以下设置并按所示进行设置。如果此处列出的选项与您看到的不匹配，请跳过 — 默认值即可。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open any page in your browser and click the Web Clipper icon to save it. Then in Athena, type:
ast.target: 在浏览器中打开任意页面，然后单击 Web Clipper 图标进行保存。然后在 Athena 中输入：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This processes all pending pages (clippings + queued URLs) into your knowledge base.
ast.target: 这会将所有待处理页面 (剪藏 + 排队的 URL) 处理到您的知识库中。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 完成 — 开始使用 Athena
